daily_summary.headline: Moderate Aurora and Routine Launches Mark the Day

top_events.title: G1 Geomagnetic Storm Expected
top_events.description: A G1 geomagnetic storm with Kp 5 is predicted, offering a good viewing opportunity for auroras, especially for observers above 60° latitude.
top_events.action: Check for clear skies and plan for aurora viewing.

top_events.title: Falcon 9 Block 5 Launches Starlink Group 10-48
top_events.description: SpaceX's Falcon 9 Block 5 is set to launch the Starlink Group 10-48, continuing the expansion of the Starlink satellite constellation.
top_events.action: Watch the live stream for the launch.

top_events.title: Long March 8A Launch with Unknown Payload
top_events.description: China's Long March 8A rocket is scheduled to launch with an undisclosed payload, marking another step in their space program.
top_events.action: Follow updates for more information on the payload.

opportunities.recommendation: Good viewing opportunity for high-latitude observers. Worth checking if you're above 60° latitude and skies are clear.
